rollback_scope: revert AO2 merge commit e6b5911d711e006beae2eb5d7853bbb3f63ebdec through a reviewed PR
remove node-specific Atlas evidence if the node is reopened
preserve the explicit-approval default and do not invoke a provider
rollback_command: Prepare a reviewed AO2 revert PR for the node merge and regenerate the Atlas readback; do not mutate main directly.
data_loss_risk: none; the change tightens an approval gate and all evidence is digest-addressed
